prayer:

Chant the Canticle of Perpetual Freeze whilst calibrating thermal conduits.
Seal the invocation with the sign of the cog, granting the cryo-chamber vigilance eternal.

prayer:

Invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within the opticon, beseeching clarity amid cooling rites.

Initiate thermodynamic hymns to soothe the opticon's fiery heart.
Verify the Machine Spirit's quiescence through auspex-scans, under Omnissiah's watchful gaze.
